fail_closed_rule: v3.8.0 stable is allowed only if every required-for-stable gate is PASS on the post-merge main SHA. Docker unavailable in this dev shell -> stable is BLOCKED regardless of other gates. Realistic Phase 16D outcome is B (v3.7.8-docker-gate-alpha) or C (no tag).
